a:r.a:t: HGV’s compensation levels and plan components vary from market standards in 4 key areas
Base commission rates are generally aligned
(4% - 6% in the market compared to 4% - 9% at HGV)
Total commission opportunity trails market for lower tiers (
9% - 20% in the market compared to 5% - 19% at HGV
within Director+ compensation plans, while HGV plans are heavily revenue weighted
Limited Profitability Measures within Director Plans
in target total cash compensation (base salary plus target sales incentives)
target in target total cash compensation
HGV includes HGV and Bluegreen unless otherwise noted
HGV data sourced from compensation plans, census data and target annual incentive data as provided by HGV
Market data reflect: Vacation ownership survey data, broader industry survey data for organizations similar in size to HGV and external competitor interviews
